profile.descripcion: A worker who emigrates no longer loses her reputation. Homely's Portable Work Profile accumulates verified references from each employer, functioning as the

items.referencias: References digitally confirmed by previous employers
items.calificaciones: Ratings and time worked documented and immutable
items.paises: Valid in any country: Costa Rica, Mexico, Spain, United States
items.acceso: Dual access: employer and worker see the same data in real time
